en: Avetta PQF - South Korea Company Information

The Small and Medium Business Administration (SMBA) has streamlined the process to starting and incorporating a business in South Korea by combining the Tax Information System, Tax Payment System, Financial Common Network, Social Insurance Information System (Public Health Insurance, National Pension Fund, Employment Insurance, Accident Compensation Insurance), Internet Register Office, Electronic Notarization System and more. The entire incorporation can be processed online at Start Biz Online.
